creator: catone@cpan.org
text:
I hope I sorted it correctly...

On Wed, Mar 24, 2010 at 16:31, Sylvio C횄짤sar <scjamorim@bsd.com.br> wrote:
> Hi Denis,
>
> 횂혻횂혻횂혻횂혻횂혻 The Makefile seems not very good, the file must is of accord with
> Porters-Handbook about PORTDOCS.
> 횂혻횂혻횂혻횂혻횂혻 The line "PORTDOCS" must be sorted.
> 횂혻횂혻횂혻횂혻횂혻 The file "pkg-plist" must be sorted too.
> Send me in format diff, please.
>

Regards, Denis.
